_note: Permuter-farm electricity model. Software metering unavailable (3090 RAPL root-only; Windows no LHM/nvidia-smi), so power is estimated from sampled CPU utilization: watts = idle_watts + (load_watts - idle_watts) * cpu_util_fraction. Wattages are whole-system wall-draw estimates (spec-derived, PSU loss folded in) — recalibrate against a smart plug if available.

3090.hardware: Ryzen 9 5900X + RTX 3090 (GPU idle during CPU-bound permuter)
